description: The network quality control system needs to be configured. The SeisComP quality control module `scqc` monitors waveform data streams in real time, detecting data gaps, timing quality problems, and other anomalies. Configure the `scqc` module parameters by setting `report.interval` to 60, `report.buffer` to 3600, `streamMask` to GE.*.*.*, and `realtime.buffer` to 1800. Save the configuration to /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/scqc.cfg.
